expected_behavior: Agent dispatches to the Existing Imperfect Repo workflow based on the explicit '/nerdbot improve' invocation
Agent runs an inventory-first, read-only assessment before proposing edits
Agent identifies canonical material, source surfaces, risky paths, shared .obsidian surfaces, and volatile workspace files
Agent proposes an additive-first repair plan that normalizes the vault before deeper enrichment
Agent requires explicit confirmation before any destructive or high-impact structural batch
